description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich orange-brown skin and a short, sturdy stem at the top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, stylized face featuring sharply angled eyes, a pointed nose, and a wide, jagged mouth filled with triangular teeth, giving it a classic jack-o'-lantern appearance. The surface of the pumpkin is slightly bumpy and matte, with subtle natural grooves and dimples visible across its body. The carved sections reveal a lighter, almost glowing inner flesh, contrasting with the darker exterior. The back of the pumpkin is uncarved and smooth, showing only the natural texture of the rind. There are no visible accessories or decorations attached to the pumpkin, and its interior is likely hollow due to the carving.
description: A round, orange-brown pumpkin with a carved, menacing jack-o'-lantern face and a short stem. The surface is bumpy and matte, with lighter inner flesh visible through the carved features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full carved face with sharp eyes, nose, and jagged mouth.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the facial carvings and the transition from carved to uncarved surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth, and bumpy pumpkin surface with no facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the carved face and the rest of the uncarved pumpkin body.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled, menacing eyes, a pointed nose, and a wide, jagged mouth filled with triangular teeth. The pattern is expressive and classic, with deep cutouts for the facial features.
